translations.en: I want to watch TV today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je veux regarder la télé.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn xem tivi.
translations.hi: आज मैं टीवी देखना चाहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil se på TV i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini saya ingin menonton TV.
translations.sv: I dag vill jag titta på tv.
translations.ro: Astăzi vreau să mă uit la televizor.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg se tv.
translations.ja: 今日はテレビを見たいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present 1sg) expressing intention; selects the bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb setting the time frame.
Bare infinitive main verb functioning as complement to the modal; separable verb not split here.

translations.en: We can watch TV together later.
translations.es: Podemos ver la tele juntos más tarde.
translations.fr: On peut regarder la télé ensemble plus tard.
translations.it: Possiamo guardare la TV insieme più tardi.
translations.ko: 나중에 같이 TV를 볼 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们可以稍后一起看电视。
translations.yue: 我哋可以之後一齊睇電視。
translations.ru: Мы можем позже вместе посмотреть телевизор.
translations.pt: Podemos ver TV juntos mais tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו יכולים לראות טלוויזיה ביחד מאוחר יותר.
translations.vi: Tí nữa chúng ta có thể xem tivi cùng nhau.
translations.nl: We kunnen later samen tv kijken.
translations.uk: Ми можемо пізніше подивитися телевізор разом.
translations.hi: हम बाद में साथ में टीवी देख सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να δούμε τηλεόραση μαζί αργότερα.
translations.nb: Vi kan se på TV sammen senere.
translations.id: Kita bisa menonton TV bersama nanti.
translations.sv: Vi kan titta på tv tillsammans senare.
translations.ro: Putem să ne uităm la televizor împreună mai târziu.
translations.cs: Později se můžeme spolu dívat na televizi.
translations.da: Vi kan se tv sammen senere.
translations.ja: あとで一緒にテレビを見られます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present 1pl) expressing ability/possibility; selects the bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb indicating a later time.
Adverb of manner indicating joint action.
Bare infinitive main verb functioning as complement to the modal.

sentences.target: Er darf nach der Arbeit fernsehen.

translations.de: Er darf nach der Arbeit fernsehen.
translations.en: He is allowed to watch TV after work.
translations.es: Él puede ver la tele después del trabajo.
translations.fr: Il peut regarder la télé après le travail.
translations.it: Lui può guardare la TV dopo il lavoro.
translations.ko: 그는 일이 끝난 후에 TV를 봐도 돼요.
translations.yue: 佢收工之後可以睇電視。
translations.ru: Ему можно смотреть телевизор после работы.
translations.pt: Ele pode ver TV depois do trabalho.
translations.he: מותר לו לראות טלוויזיה אחרי העבודה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy được xem tivi sau khi làm việc.
translations.ar: يسمح לו بمشاهدة التلفاز بعد العمل.
translations.nl: Hij mag na het werk tv kijken.
translations.uk: Йому можна дивитися телевізор після роботи.
translations.hi: काम के बाद वह टीवी देख सकता है.
translations.pl: On może oglądać telewizję po pracy.
translations.el: Μετά τη δουλειά μπορεί να δει τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Han får se på TV etter jobb.
translations.id: Dia boleh menonton TV setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Han får titta på tv efter jobbet.
translations.ro: El are voie să se uite la televizor după muncă.
translations.cs: Po práci se může dívat na televizi.
translations.da: Han må se tv efter arbejde.
translations.fi: Hän saa katsoa televisiota työn jälkeen.
translations.ja: 彼は仕事の後にテレビを見てもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present 3sg) expressing permission; selects the bare infinitive complement.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article in dative singular (feminine) agreeing with 'Arbeit' after 'nach'.
Noun (feminine), head of the prepositional object; dative singular with 'nach'.
Bare infinitive main verb functioning as complement to the modal.

translations.en: In the evening she wants to watch TV.
translations.es: Por la noche ella quiere ver la tele.
translations.fr: Le soir, elle veut regarder la télé.
translations.it: La sera vuole guardare la TV.
translations.pt: À noite ela quer ver TV.
translations.vi: Buổi tối cô ấy muốn xem tivi.
translations.ar: في المساء هي تريد مشاهدة التلفاز.
translations.hi: शाम को वह टीवी देखना चाहती है.
translations.el: Το βράδυ θέλει να δει τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Om kvelden vil hun se på TV.
translations.id: Pada malam hari dia ingin menonton TV.
translations.sv: På kvällen vill hon titta på tv.
translations.ro: Seara ea vrea să se uite la televizor.
translations.da: Om aftenen vil hun se tv.
translations.ja: 夜は彼女がテレビを見たいです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition with embedded article forming a dative PP.
Noun (masculine), object of the preposition 'am'; dative singular; fronted temporal PP.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II present, 3sg) expressing desire/politeness; selects the bare infinitive complement.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject appearing after the finite verb due to initial PP (verb-second).
Bare infinitive main verb functioning as complement to the modal; separable verb not split here.
